currentLinkedIn.headline: Enterprise Account Executive at Vanta | Closing $500K–$2M Deals | 140% of Quota FY24
currentLinkedIn.about: I sell enterprise security software to the CISO and the CFO. Nine years of enterprise SaaS — I've closed over $18M in new ARR and built a playbook that works in complex, multi-stakeholder deals.

experience.title: Enterprise Account Executive
bullets: Closed $7.2M in new ARR in FY24 against a $5.2M quota — 138% attainment
Landed three Fortune 500 accounts by orchestrating executive-alignment sessions with CISO, CFO, and CTO
Expanded an existing $200K account to $1.1M through a multi-year, multi-product renewal

experience.title: Account Executive
bullets: Achieved 120% quota attainment for three consecutive years selling to mid-market compliance buyers
Reduced average sales cycle from 110 days to 72 days by introducing proof-of-value workshops
